testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/accept returns 404 when booking is missing
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/accept returns 404 when booking is missing

testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/accept returns 400 for non-pending booking
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/accept returns 400 for non-pending booking

testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/accept updates booking, emits status, and creates notification
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/accept updates booking, emits status, and creates notification

testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/start returns 403 when mechanic is not assigned
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/start returns 403 when mechanic is not assigned

testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/start moves accepted booking to in-progress
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/start moves accepted booking to in-progress

testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/complete validates amount
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/complete validates amount

testcase.classname: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/complete marks booking as completed and updates payment
testcase.name: mechanic routes unit tests POST /booking/:id/complete marks booking as completed and updates payment
